current_task_description: Comprehensive unit tests for css-mappings.ts: all color values, font settings, combined rules for all appliesTo groups, edge cases
last_completed_description: Added 71 comprehensive YouTube unit tests (platform detection, config, applySetting, native settings, getCurrentValue) + updated CHANGELOG with Netflix entry and stats (345 tests, 8 platforms). Fixed ESLint no-unsafe-member-access errors. Commit 830397d pushed.

history.details: Full per-site settings: src/site-settings.ts (CRUD), popup scope toggle UI, content script integration, 17 new unit tests, all 143 tests green
Prime Video CSS-only subtitle support, 11 regional Amazon domains, 16 unit tests, 159 total tests passing
Max (HBO Max) CSS-only subtitle support, CaptionWindow/TextCue/CueBoxContainer selectors, max.com + hbomax.com, 15 unit tests, 174 total tests green
SoundHop crash fixes: debug_log→syslog, ppv null check, catch_unwind on all property handlers, safe-install.sh + safe-uninstall.sh scripts, CRASH-ANALYSIS.md
Fixed Nebula font-family E2E flake: popup tab closing before async save completed. Now waits for 'Saved!' confirmation. Also updated README (ed48695) and BACKLOG (b787fc7).
Chrome Web Store listing: store/DESCRIPTION.md, store/PRIVACY_POLICY.md, store/CHECKLIST.md, store/SCREENSHOTS.md. Nebula extracted to own module with 14 tests. 188 tests green.
Crunchyroll subtitle support (CSS-only, Bitmovin player bmpui-ui-subtitle-label/overlay selectors, 15 unit tests, 203 total tests green)
Comprehensive detection tests for all 6 platforms including edge cases (regional domains, legacy domains, subdomain variants). 25 new tests, 228 total tests green.
Disney+ subtitle support (CSS injection + Shadow DOM, disney-web-player custom element, dss-subtitle-renderer-cue + hive-subtitle-renderer-cue, 22 unit tests, 254 total tests green)
GitHub Actions CI workflow prepared at store/ci-workflow.yml. Cannot push to .github/workflows/ — PAT lacks workflow scope. Updated BACKLOG and CHANGELOG.
Netflix subtitle support: CSS injection targeting Cadmium player-timedtext containers, 18 unit tests, 274 total tests green

71 comprehensive YouTube unit tests (detection, config, applySetting, native settings, getCurrentValue). Fixed ESLint no-unsafe-member-access. Updated CHANGELOG with Netflix + stats (345 tests, 8 platforms).
